title: The Charm of Nature
description: This modpack has 588 biomes. Each biome has a very different style. You can explore as much as you want. Discover the charm of nature at every turn.
body:
_Towering, massive mountains,  
Winding, twisting rivers,  
Vast, sweeping plains,  
Mysterious, silent forests,  
Boundless, endless deserts,  
Rugged, steep ice fields—  
One by one, rich biomes weave  
Into this wonderful, majestic land._
# Overview
This modpack is designed to make people feel the charm of nature in _Minecraft_
It uses a lot of mods for **terrain** and **biomes** to make the vanilla terrain more interesting, with _Distant Horizon_ mods and lots of **optimized mods**. It can make your Minecraft experience feel better.This modpack has **588** biomes. Each biome has a very different style. You can explore as much as you want. _Discover the charm of nature at every turn._
# Terrain
There are a lot of terrain mods.
It has towering mountain peaks, meandering rivers, endless plains, majestic deserts, mysterious and strange forests, and many peculiar biomes
# Distant Horizons
Just wait a few minutes on the ground and you can see the mountains in the distance
![Distant Horizons: Just wait a few minutes.There are many rivers, biomes, peaks, plains and islands.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/412410619a00a5efce3a4e9f5bf47e52f894dc44.jpeg)
